title: Professional UI redesign with refined typography and layouts

requirements.text: Refine the typography system to use a professional font pairing with clear hierarchy: use a modern sans-serif for headings (weight 600-700) and body text (weight 400-500), ensuring all text is easily readable with appropriate line-heights and letter-spacing
acceptanceCriteria: Headings use consistent font weights (600-700) with clear size hierarchy
Body text uses readable weights (400-500) with optimal line-height for readability
Letter-spacing is adjusted for professional appearance

requirements.text: Redesign the Layout component header and hero section with a professional aesthetic: replace casual styling with a clean, minimalist design featuring subtle shadows, refined spacing, and a more sophisticated layout structure
acceptanceCriteria: Header uses professional spacing and subtle elevation effects
Hero section has a refined, business-appropriate visual treatment
Overall layout conveys trustworthiness and credibility

requirements.text: Update the EmergencyContacts component to use a more professional presentation: replace the prominent alert styling with a clean card-based layout, use subtle borders and shadows, and refine the contact list to look more like a professional directory
acceptanceCriteria: Emergency contacts displayed in professional card format
Alert styling replaced with subtle, business-appropriate visual cues
Contact information presented in a clear, directory-style format

requirements.text: Refine the HealthRoutineTracker component with professional form styling: use clean input fields with subtle borders, organized sections with clear labels, and a polished submission button with appropriate hover states
acceptanceCriteria: Form inputs have professional styling with clear focus states
Section organization uses clear visual hierarchy
Submit button has polished appearance with smooth interactions

requirements.text: Update the HealthChatInterface component with a professional chat design: use a clean message bubble design, refined color contrast, organized layout with clear sender distinction, and professional spacing between messages
acceptanceCriteria: Chat messages use professional bubble design with appropriate padding
User and AI messages are clearly distinguished with professional styling
Message spacing and layout convey a polished, business-appropriate interface

requirements.text: Refine the color palette to maintain the health-focused theme while adding professional polish: adjust the existing OKLCH colors to use more sophisticated tones, reduce saturation slightly for a mature look, and ensure strong contrast ratios for accessibility
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette maintains health-focused calming effect while looking more professional
All text maintains WCAG AA contrast ratios or better
Color scheme conveys trustworthiness and credibility

requirements.text: Update button and interactive element styling across all components to use consistent professional design: rounded corners with subtle radius, refined hover and active states, clear focus indicators, and appropriate elevation changes
acceptanceCriteria: All buttons use consistent professional styling
Hover states provide clear visual feedback
Focus indicators meet accessibility standards
Interactive elements convey quality and polish

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and components/ui directory
Maintain the existing health-focused theme direction while adding professional polish
Preserve all existing functionality while updating visual design
Keep the calming color palette foundation but refine it for professional appearance
nonGoals: Adding new features or functionality beyond visual refinement
Changing the application's core user flows or navigation structure
Modifying backend logic or data structures
Replacing the entire color scheme with non-health-focused colors
